name: Rebecca Price
description: Board Certified Hospital Chaplain at Bluff City Medical Center and host of Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Writing about faith, healing, and hope from Memphis, TN.

name: Sandra Coles
description: Nursing professor at Bluff City Community College and occasional guest contributor on health and community care topics.

name: Pastor William Greer
description: Pastor of Grace Community Church in Memphis. Mentor, preacher, and voice of wisdom in the Memphis faith community.

name: Rev. Angela Dawson
description: Chaplain at Golden Heart Medical Center and clergy peer. Writes on hospital ministry and spiritual care.

name: Guest Contributor
description: Occasional guest voices from the Memphis faith and wellness community.
